title: Machine Learning Engineer
required_qualifications: 3+ years of experience working on ML projects for computer vision / graphics applications.
Software engineering skills and proficiency in Python.
BA/BS degree in computer vision, computer graphics, machine learning or related field.
preferred_qualifications: MS or PhD in computer vision, computer graphics, machine learning, computer science, computer engineering or related fields.
Self-motivated with proven ability to effectively prioritize and deliver tasks on schedule.
Excellent communication and experience working with cross-functional teams.
responsibilities: deliver algorithms that power many Apple technologies, including Apple Vision Pro's Eyesight and Persona
discover and build solutions to previously-unsolved challenges in human representation and motion impacting millions of users
actively involved in the whole ML cycle from data collection design and data processing to model design and experiments to validation and QA in the wild
perform applied research development to adapt state-of-the-art methods or implement new methods to ship features on iOS and VisionOS platforms
work closely with other ML engineers as well as data and software engineers both internally and cross-functionally
education: BA/BS degree in computer vision, computer graphics, machine learning or related field. MS or PhD in computer vision, computer graphics, machine learning, computer science, computer engineering or related fields is a plus.
